title: スライド作成skillはどうなった？
summary_text: **Findings (Production Risks)** - `HIGH` Ambiguous routing can still exit `0` and look successful to orchestrators that only check process status. In `check`, `selection_required=true` still returns `status: "ok"` and only nulls `recommendation`/`route_ready` ([orchestrator-adapter.js](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide-script-prep/scripts/orchestrator-adapter.js#L1290), [orchestrator-adapter.js](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide-script-prep/scripts/orchestrator-adapter.js#L1307)). Main exits non-zero only for `status==="error"` ([orchestrator-adapter.js](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide-script-prep/scripts/orchestrator-adapter.js#L1390)). Wrapper just forwards exit code ([slide-script-prep-adapter.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/lib/slide-script-prep-adapter.sh#L104)). - `HIGH` Downstream guard is bypassable if `--workflow-decision` is omitted or path is missing. `validateWorkflowSelection()` returns `null` and does not block in that case ([run-slide-variant-matrix.js](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/run-slide-variant-matrix.js#L117)). That means unresolved selection protection depends on caller discipline, not hard enforcement. - `HIGH` Variant matrix is fail-closed on any single renderer outage (including Manus/API auth/network). Matrix status requires both variants PASS ([run-slide-variant-matrix.js](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/run-slide-variant-matrix.js#L352)), otherwise exits with failure ([run-slide-variant-matrix.js](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/run-slide-variant-matrix.js#L405)). Operationally this is a production availability risk if Manus is degraded. - `MEDIUM` CLI silently ignores unknown flags in variant matrix. `default: break` in arg parsing means typoed options are dropped without error ([run-slide-variant-matrix.js](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/run-slide-variant-matrix.js#L66)), which can hide bad prod invocations. - `LOW` Wrapper’s missing-script JSON error path depends on `jq`. If `jq` is absent, the fallback error emission itself fails ([slide-script-prep-adapter.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/lib/slide-script-prep-adapter.sh#L44)). **Missing Live Verification Points** - No live E2E verification that FUGUE wrapper output (`route_ready=false`, `selection_required=true`) is always honored before any downstream render path. Existing wrapper test is contract/happy-path oriented ([test-slide-script-prep-adapter.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/tests/test-slide-script-prep-adapter.sh#L219)). - No live test proving `run-slide-variant-matrix` is always invoked with a valid `--workflow-decision`; current unit test only covers explicit unresolved JSON, not missing-file bypass ([test-unit-variant-matrix.js](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/test-unit-variant-matrix.js#L61)). - Adapter integration is registered with `validation_mode: "contract"` (not smoke/live) ([peripheral-adapters.json](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/config/integrations/peripheral-adapters.json#L234)). **Assumption** - This risk assessment assumes at least one production caller may gate on exit status alone instead of checking `route_ready`/`selection_required` fields.
